svg.aria-label: Chalkbox self-testing generation loop: prompt to Codex to failed test to fix to verified to published

g.text: Type the misconception; get a self-tested manipulative in two minutes.
why does dividing by ½ make the answer bigger?
const quotient = d // bug: should be 1 / d
▸ invariant: drag divisor smaller ⇒ quotient bigger
↻ retry · Codex reads the failure trace
trace ▸ quotient = d → should be 1 / d
published to a sandboxed, network-severed iframe
A student opens it on any phone. No login.

svg.text: Codex SDK · GPT-5.6 · Next.js · Supabase · Vercel
